title: Hamas releases 20 Israeli hostages under Ceasefire Deal as global leaders prepare for Gaza Summit
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - Hamas handed over 20 surviving Israeli hostages on Monday as part of a U.S.-brokered ceasefire agreement, with President Donald Trump and other world leaders set to convene for a critical summit on Gaza.In Tel Aviv, thousands gathered in a heartfelt show of support for the hostages’ families, erupting into a mix of joyous cheers, tears, and song as news of the initial releases spread.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - Hamas handed over 20 surviving Israeli hostages on Monday as part of a U.S.-brokered ceasefire agreement, with President Donald Trump and other world leaders set to convene for a critical summit on Gaza.In Tel Aviv, thousands gathered in a heartfelt show of support for the hostages’ families, erupting into a mix of joyous cheers, tears, and song as news of the initial releases spread."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Yet, the somber reality of those who did not survive cast a heavy shadow over the celebrations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Under the terms of the ceasefire, Israel is expected to release nearly 2,000 Palestinian detainees in exchange, marking a significant step toward de-escalation in the region.","html":"Under the terms of the ceasefire, Israel is expected to release nearly 2,000 Palestinian detainees in exchange, marking a significant step toward de-escalation in the region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Read more on Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Hamas releases 20 Israeli hostages under Ceasefire Deal as global leaders prepare for Gaza Summit
